heading: Definitions
label: 6901 Definitions

children.heading: Administration
children.label: 1 Administration
children.text: The term “Administration” means the Small Business Administration.

children.heading: Administrator
children.label: 2 Administrator
children.text: The term “Administrator” means the Administrator of the Small Business Administration.

children.heading: Capacity building services
children.label: 3 Capacity building services
children.text: The term “capacity building services” means services provided to an organization that is, or that is in the process of becoming, a microenterprise development organization or program, for the purpose of enhancing its ability to provide training and services to disadvantaged entrepreneurs.

children.heading: Collaborative
children.label: 4 Collaborative
children.text: The term “collaborative” means 2 or more nonprofit entities that agree to act jointly as a qualified organization under this chapter.

children.label: C
children.text: an entrepreneur that lacks adequate access to capital or other resources essential for business success, or is economically disadvantaged, as determined by the Administrator.

children.heading: Indian tribe
children.label: 6 Indian tribe
children.text: The term “Indian tribe” has the meaning given the term in .section 4702 of title 12

children.heading: Intermediary
children.label: 7 Intermediary
children.text: The term “intermediary” means a private, nonprofit entity that seeks to serve microenterprise development organizations and programs as authorized under .section 6904 of this title

children.heading: Low-income person
children.label: 8 Low-income person
children.text: The term “low-income person” has the meaning given the term in .section 4702 of title 12

children.heading: Microentrepreneur
children.label: 9 Microentrepreneur
children.text: The term “microentrepreneur” means the owner or developer of a microenterprise.

children.label: B
children.text: generally lacks access to conventional loans, equity, or other banking services.

children.heading: Microenterprise development organization or program
children.label: 11 Microenterprise development organization or program
children.text: The term “microenterprise development organization or program” means a nonprofit entity, or a program administered by such an entity, including community development corporations or other nonprofit development organizations and social service organizations, that provides services to disadvantaged entrepreneurs.

children.heading: Training and technical assistance
children.label: 12 Training and technical assistance
children.text: The term “training and technical assistance” means services and support provided to disadvantaged entrepreneurs, such as assistance for the purpose of enhancing business planning, marketing, management, financial management skills, and assistance for the purpose of accessing financial services.

children.heading: Very low-income person
children.label: 13 Very low-income person
children.text: The term “very low-income person” means having an income, adjusted for family size, of not more than 150 percent of the poverty line (as defined in , including any revision required by that section).section 9902(2) of title 42
